metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for YoboLabs apps — landing pages, campaigns, and more

plugins.name: crm
plugins.description: Update the Yobo CRM directly from Claude Code — create, read, and update companies, deals, leads, people, tasks, notes, custom fields, lifecycles, and GTM campaigns via the REST API

plugins.name: yobolabs
plugins.description: Configure YoboLabs apps from Claude Code — create, edit, and publish Slides landing pages (microsites) via the REST API

plugins.name: content-creation
plugins.description: Build short-form campaign ads by talking to Claude — one ad spec produces both a finished mp4 (Remotion: clips, trims, captions, transitions, motion-graphic overlays, music) and an editable CapCut project. Includes ffmpeg media processing, silence detection, and fast variant generation

plugins.name: campaign-wargame
plugins.description: War-game campaigns before launch — five review roles (researcher, devil's advocate, ripple-effects, opportunity scout, reviewer) stress-test campaign plans, drip flows, segments, offers, and creatives on paper first; plus a simulation mode that trains the team and builds the trap library from past campaigns

plugins.name: designify
plugins.description: Ad-creative craft capability-capture — an agency-model loop (recon, concept directions, human pick, director deepen, adversarial crit, judge gate) that produces craft files with positive AND negative gen-AI prompt guidance, authenticity-first judging, a proof-ladder execute skill over the existing actuators, and blind-replay calibration on real campaign outcomes

plugins.name: mockify
plugins.description: App-design (UI/UX) capability-capture — an agency-model loop (ecosystem recon, concept directions with rendered HTML mockups, human pick, director deepen, adversarial crit, usability-first judge gate) that produces buildable design specs + mockups for jetdevs ecosystem apps, with post-implementation grading via screenshot diffs and human verdicts

plugins.name: growthify
plugins.description: Generative-first growth framework — turns a metric problem or a design surface into a ranked, evidence-grounded portfolio of growth, gamification, and game-theory mechanics, then deepens the winners into ship-ready experiment designs. The generative sibling to campaign-wargame: externalized lens packs, a role-separated generator, an anti-sycophancy judge gate, and blind calibration. Built for the team — no coding required.

plugins.name: spar
plugins.description: General-domain sparring partner + war-gaming — steelman-then-assault challenge of ideas, proposals, designs, and goals; fought-on-paper missions for irreversible decisions; per-domain expertise earned via research and compounding domain packs.

plugins.name: wargame
plugins.description: War-gaming framework that lets any model see around corners — externalized foresight via adversarial agent roles (recon, red-team, cascade, scout, judge), epistemic tagging, order-N consequence + opportunity propagation, trap libraries from real incidents, and Fable-5-direct exemplars as ground truth. Turns plans into fought-on-paper missions any executor model can run.

plugins.name: gtm-lifecycle
plugins.description: End-to-end GTM strategy process — elicit the real situation, draft a positioning brief with falsifiable bets, spar every bet adversarially, war-game the one-way doors, synthesize a challenged strategy. Use for "gtm", "go to market", "positioning", "find the wedge", "launch strategy", "who's the buyer". Depends on the spar plugin (spar:spar + spar:wargame).
